title: Body of woman found: No arrests
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Police are still investigating after the finding of the body of a 24-year-old woman in New Rest in Mossel Bay on Saturday, 10 August.


> No arrests have been made yet.


The body, partially naked, was found in a bushy area just before 07:00 that morning.

Police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies said a case of murder was opened at the time of the discovery. The police have not yet disclosed the woman's identity.

Read more on www.mosselbayadvertiser.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
